steps.title: Recognize that volume scales by the cube of the linear scale factor
steps.content: When converting units for volume, the conversion factor must be cubed. Since 1 yard = 0.914 meters, we convert cubic yards to cubic meters using $(0.914)^3$ as our conversion factor.

steps.title: Convert the volume to cubic meters
steps.content:
Multiply the volume in cubic yards by the cubic conversion factor:
$$247.00 \times 0.7636 = 188.6 \text{ cubic meters}$$
